title: Circle craters 17% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back rival stablecoin network
summary: Open Standard unveiled Open USD, a new dollar stablecoin backed by more than 140 partners including Coinbase, Stripe, Mastercard, Visa and BlackRock.
body: Open Standard unveiled Open USD, a new dollar stablecoin backed by more than 140 partners including Coinbase, Stripe, Mastercard, Visa and BlackRock. The stablecoin is designed to offer zero-fee minting and redemption while sharing reserve income with participating businesses. For Coinbase, the news is mixed: it may expand institutional adoption and Base-related stablecoin activity, but it could also create USDC pressure because Coinbase has historically benefited from the USDC ecosystem.
